result: The data cleaning and preprocessing task is complete. The raw survey datasets were loaded, merged by NSID, and the household weekly income variables were derived according to the specifications. Specifically, continuous income values for ages 14 and 15 were recoded for missing values and banded into the common scheme, while banded values for ages 16 and 17 were harmonised. All missing-value mappings, including the special requirements for "Not yet paid" and "No parent in household", were applied. The final analysis-ready file containing NSID, the four banded income variables (incwhh14, incwhh15, incwhh16, incwhh17), and the two continuous income variables (incwhhcnt14, incwhhcnt15) has been saved to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
